conversations.content: Today we studied the Cybertronic Intelligent Assembly Workshop Safety Operation Code. If an industrial robotic arm is found to have abnormal shaking or trajectory deviation...
Robotic arm shaking? That's serious — what if it hurts someone! What's the first step?
then press the red mushroom-head emergency stop button, then isolate the workstation and cut off the power source to the robotic arm.
Emergency stop button plus isolation and power cut — protect people first! What other dangerous situations are there?

If excessive concentrations of flammable or explosive gases are detected in the workshop air, then turn on the rooftop explosion-proof exhaust fans for forced ventilation, then prohibit any open flame or static-generating operations.
Flammable gas leak? Ventilation plus ban on flames and static — must handle this immediately! Any third scenario?

If an AGV unmanned vehicle is detected to be out of control and crashing or has lost communication, then activate the electromagnetic track locking device, then clear personnel from the operating area of the runaway vehicle.
Runaway AGV crashing is extremely dangerous — electromagnetic lock plus clearing personnel, well done! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?

If any of the above situations occurs, then sound the plant-wide audible and visual evacuation alarm, stop the entire production line, and initiate the safety department's accident investigation procedure.

think: Cybertronic Intelligent Assembly Workshop safety: three anomalies: robotic arm shaking/trajectory deviation → emergency stop + isolate power; flammable/explosive gas → explosion-proof fans + ban flames/static; AGV runaway crash → electromagnetic track lock + clear area. Any case → sound plant-wide evacuation alarm + stop production line + initiate accident investigation.
memory: Cybertronic Intelligent Assembly Workshop Safety Operation Code: If an industrial robotic arm is found to have abnormal shaking or trajectory deviation, then press the red mushroom-head emergency stop button, then isolate the workstation and cut off the power source to the robotic arm; if excessive concentrations of flammable or explosive gases are detected in the workshop air, then turn on the rooftop explosion-proof exhaust fans for forced ventilation, then prohibit any open flame or static-generating operations; if an AGV unmanned vehicle is detected to be out of control and crashing or has lost communication, then activate the electromagnetic track locking device, then clear personnel from the operating area of the runaway vehicle; if any of the above situations occurs, then sound the plant-wide audible and visual evacuation alarm, stop the entire production line, and initiate the safety department's accident investigation procedure.
